[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Mon Feb 03, 2014 5:51 pm This link was posted on the Evageeks twitter, but I remember someone posting about this in the old GAINAX cash cow thread so I thought I'd follow up with the new information here. [url]http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-2831.html[/url] I think it's a great figure, love how Shinjis posing like he's modeling his luggage. He should be listening to the SDAT, but whatever, the world needs more Shinji figures.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Feb 04, 2014 10:22 am Someone loan me $6000. https://otakumode.com/shop/521c1da88bac0e5927000061 Cmon, I'm sure at least one of you has to have a spare six grand lying around. Help a brotha out. Looking it up I see this is almost two years old but I've never seen it before.

[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Wed Feb 05, 2014 2:00 pm AR-99 wrote: Don't know how familiar you are with the end of the manga as that figure is based on the cover illustration from the July 2013 issue of Young Ace, which serialized the final chapter. Personally I like it as it's one of the few images of Shinji smiling and he isn't off in Shinjiland, which the SDAT is emblematic of.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Feb 09, 2014 1:03 am Got the 2014 calendar with Kaworu and Eva-13 on the front as it was discounted. Not going to be used of course, that's what my free car calendar is for and I don't dig looking at the same image for 2 months.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Feb 11, 2014 1:11 am http://animeanime.jp/article/2014/02/10/17420.html http://www.evastylecard.com/

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Feb 11, 2014 8:15 am I was going to say Asuka got the short end of the stick until I noticed that she's inside the outline of Unit 02.

[]: I found my calculator but I wish I hadn't.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Feb 13, 2014 11:12 pm Wow, I was just looking at some Eva pics on Google Images and came across this old picture. [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/post/376419/The-Gainax-Cash-Cow-or-Why-The-F-and-Did-I-Buy-That/#376419[/url]. It's hard to believe I've been coming here almost 4 years now, and my Eva merch collection's barely grown! Glad to say I've long since caught up with the manga, though. Maybe I'll order the new Revoltech Unit-13.

[]:             Quote Post by Stratomeister » Fri Feb 14, 2014 2:38 am CJD wrote: Someone loan me $6000. https://otakumode.com/shop/521c1da88bac0e5927000061 Cmon, I'm sure at least one of you has to have a spare six grand lying around. Help a brotha out. Looking it up I see this is almost two years old but I've never seen it before.

[]:             Quote Post by Tabby » Fri Feb 14, 2014 8:05 pm And here I thought there were only two existing plush of Shinji! I just bought two more official sega plush which I've never seen before and google searched them for two days before buying. I caved today as a Valentine's present to myself. <3 Two keychain plush by sega to be exact. Since my goal is to have one of every official Shinji plush ever made I was obligated by my own insanity ^^; Good thing Kaworu is optional in my collection. Or I would die. O.O

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Mar 05, 2014 11:42 pm Now you can get Misato's shoulder holster. Actually, some people could find this useful. Too bad it's nearly $600.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Mar 05, 2014 11:48 pm ^ I'm not a weapon nerd by any means, but that actually sounds like a cool piece of merch. I'm guessing her HK USP would fit in the holster then?
